name: Espresso
description: Strong and bold classic single shot of espresso.

name: Cappuccino
description: Espresso combined with equal parts steamed milk and deep layer of foam.

name: Caramel Macchiato
description: Freshly steamed milk with vanilla-flavored syrup marked with espresso and caramel drizzle.

name: Iced Latte
description: Espresso poured over ice and milk, sweetened to your liking.

name: Cold Brew
description: Our signature blend, steeped cold for 20 hours for a super-smooth flavor.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Freshly baked, soft muffin bursting with wild blueberries.

name: Butter Croissant
description: Flaky, buttery, and baked to golden perfection.
